code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let maybe_prefix = io.read_line()
  let prefix = match maybe_prefix
  when Some(p)
    p
  when None
    Ok(())
    return Ok(())
  end

  mut running = true
  while running
    let maybe_line = io.read_line()
    match maybe_line
    when Some(line)
      if string.starts_with(line, prefix)
        println("YES")
      else
        println("NO")
      end
    when None
      mut running = false
    end
  end

  Ok(())
end
